Ambient Gradient

Extracted from ai-voice-ui/voice-ui-2.jpg · 4 harmony options · Light & Dark modes

Still Horizon
Monochromatic · Single hue from the calm/idle panel
Drawn entirely from the left panel — the resting state. Pure electric blue in varying depths against near-black. This is the embodiment at rest: contemplative, present, waiting. The near-black background creates a sense of infinite depth. A warm off-white accent provides the only point of warmth — a whisper that something is alive in the dark.

Aurora Wake
Analogous · Adjacent hues: Blue → Teal → Emerald
Rides the cool-to-green gradient visible in the right panel's aurora. Blue transitions through teal into emerald — the embodiment shifting from calm attention to active processing. The amber accent from the wave crest provides warmth for speaking/output states. This palette has natural state-mapping built in: blue = idle, teal = listening, green = thinking, amber = speaking.

AMB
Calm & Signal
Complementary · Opposite hues: Electric Blue ↔ Warm Amber
Distills the two-panel image to its core duality — the calm blue of the idle state versus the warm amber that crests when the agent activates. Maximum clarity for state communication: blue = at rest, amber = attention/output. Clean, high-contrast, unambiguous. The most app-ready palette — users will instinctively read the temperature shift as a state change.

Spectral Pulse
Split-Complementary · Blue + Soft Violet + Warm Amber
Captures the full emotional arc of the right panel — the violet base of the wave, the blue field it rises from, and the amber warmth at the crest. Three temperature zones that map naturally to state: cool violet = processing/thinking (internal energy), blue = calm/listening, warm amber = speaking/output. The most emotionally nuanced option — the embodiment can traverse the full spectrum of engagement without ever feeling jarring.
